name: industries-fsc-mortgage-origination
description: FSC Mortgage Origination — URLA/1003 data model, underwriting, conditions, compliance (HMDA/TRID/RESPA), LOS integration, and closing

compliance.notes: Mortgage application records contain PII (SSN references, DOB, income, credit scores) and are subject to HMDA, TRID, RESPA, ECOA, and Fair Housing Act requirements. Queries returning applicant data must use minimum necessary fields. Race, Ethnicity, and Sex fields on LoanApplicant are HMDA-only — do not expose to underwriters to prevent fair lending violations.

changelog.summary: Initial release — full mortgage origination lifecycle from URLA/1003 intake through underwriting, conditions management, HMDA/TRID/RESPA compliance, and closing
